login.title: Log in to your account
login.description: Enter your email and password below to log in

register.title: Create an account
register.description: Enter your information to create an account
register.name: Name
register.usernameHint: 3-32 characters; letters, digits, _ and - only. Shown publicly. You can change it later.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email address
verifyEmail.description: Thanks for signing up! Before getting started, could you verify your email address by clicking on the link we just emailed to you? If you didn't receive the email, we will gladly send you another.
verifyEmail.linkSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.

twoFactorChallenge.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactorChallenge.description: Enter the authentication code provided by your authenticator application.
twoFactorChallenge.recoveryDescription: Please confirm access to your account by entering one of your emergency recovery codes.

username.title: Pick your username
username.description: Choose a public-facing handle. Your real name stays private.
username.label: Username
username.hint: 3-32 characters; letters, digits, _ and - only. Shown publicly across the LAN ecosystem.

publicProfile.noUpcomingEvents: Not registered for any upcoming events.
publicProfile.previewIndicator: Preview — this is how your profile looks to anonymous visitors

profileVisibility.private: Only you can see this profile

picker.description: Pick a seat for an attendee on one of your tickets.
picker.selectPersonHint: Select a person on the right to start picking.
picker.noSeatPlan: This event does not have a seat plan yet.
picker.noTickets: You have no tickets that you can manage seats for at this event.

hint.chooseAssigneeFirst: Select a person on the right before picking a seat.
hint.cannotPickForPerson: You do not have permission to pick a seat for this person.
hint.blockNotForCategory: Your ticket category can't sit in this block.

nav.pickASeat: Click a seat on the map to pick one.

admin.categoryEditorDescription: Pick which ticket categories may sit in each block. Leave empty to allow any ticket.
admin.noBlocks: This plan has no blocks yet — add blocks in the editor.
admin.noCategoriesForEvent: No ticket categories for this event yet.

invalidationDialog.title: Seats will be released
invalidationDialog.description: These seats are currently occupied and your change will remove them or no longer match the assignee's ticket category. Confirming notifies each affected user by email + in-app.
invalidationDialog.notificationHint: Affected users will receive an email + in-app notification with a link to pick a new seat.

toolbar.saveFailedGeneric: Could not save. Please try again.

block.title: Block
block.name: Name
block.seatTitlePrefixHint: Optional label prepended to every seat title in this block. Example: VIP- → VIP-A1.
block.backgroundImageSaveFirst: Save the seat plan once before uploading a background image for this block. New blocks get their permanent ID on save.

blocks.title: Blocks
blocks.empty: No blocks yet. Click the block tool in the toolbar to add one.

addBlockDialog.title: Add block
addBlockDialog.description: Create an empty block or seed it with a grid of seats.

editor.unsavedLeaveWarning: You have unsaved changes. Leave the page anyway?
editor.emptyCanvasHint: Select a seat, row, block, or label to edit its properties. Add a block to get started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your name and email address
profile.name: Name
profile.addressDescription: Required for purchases. Provide your address and at least one contact method.
profile.resendLink: Click here to resend the verification email.
profile.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
profile.deleteAccountDescription: Delete your account and all of its resources
profile.deleteAccountWarning: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account, please download any data or information that you wish to retain.
profile.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
profile.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.
profile.customizationDescription: Public-facing username, bio, avatar and banner. None of your contact details below are shown publicly.
profile.usernameHint: 3-32 characters; letters, digits, _ and - only. Shown publicly across the LAN ecosystem.
profile.shortBioHint: Up to 160 characters. Shown next to your username on your public profile.
profile.profileDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell visitors more about you, your favorite games, your team, etc.
profile.profileDescriptionHint: Plain text only. Up to 5000 characters.
profile.profileEmojiHint: Single emoji shown next to your username.
profile.avatarUploadHint: PNG, JPG or WebP. Up to 5 MB. Will be cropped to a square and resized to 1000×1000.
profile.bannerUploadHint: PNG, JPG or WebP. Up to 5 MB. Will be cropped to 3:1 and resized to 1500×500.
profile.previewProfileHint: Opens your public profile in a new tab as if you were an anonymous visitor.
profile.contactSectionDescription: Your real name, email, phone and address are private. They are only used for purchases, ticket fulfilment and account recovery — never shown on your public profile.

password.title: Password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used across the LAN ecosystem. Your selection is propagated to all connected Lan* apps.
language.label: Display language

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Control how your name appears on public seat plans.
privacy.seatVisibleLabel: Show my name on public seat plans
privacy.seatVisibleHelp: When turned off, your seat still appears on public seat plans but without your name. Other attendees with a ticket for the same event will always see your name on the seat plan, regardless of this setting.
privacy.profileVisibilityDescription: Decide who can view your public profile page.
privacy.profileVisibilityPublic: Public — anyone, even visitors who are not logged in
privacy.profileVisibilityPrivate: Private — only you can see your profile

consent.heading: Consent
consent.description: These are the platform policies you have actively accepted. Withdraw any consent at any time (GDPR Art. 7(3)).
consent.empty: You currently hold no active consents.

withdraw_dialog.title: Withdraw consent for {name}?
withdraw_dialog.description: This is irreversible from your side: the platform admins will be notified, and if the policy is required for using the service, you will be redirected to the re-acceptance page on your next request. Optionally tell us why.

settings.manageDescription: Manage your profile and account settings

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your two-factor authentication and active sessions

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
twoFactor.setupDescription: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the following QR code with your authenticator app and enter the generated code.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesDescription: Store these recovery codes in a secure password manager. They can be used to recover access to your account if you lose your two-factor device.

eventDashboard.emptyHelp: No published event is currently running or upcoming. Publish an event to see live stats here.

cards.ticketsInSaleHelp: Remaining quota across all ticket types

ticketTypes.heading: Ticket types
ticketTypes.name: Name
ticketTypes.empty: No ticket types configured for this event.

achievements.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this achievement?
achievements.earnedBy: This achievement has been earned by {count} user(s).

form.notificationPlaceholder: Text shown when a user earns this achievement
form.notificationHint: Max 500 characters. Sent to the user when they earn the badge.
form.triggerDescription: Select which events will grant this achievement to users

user.leaveCaptainConfirm: You are the captain. If you leave, captaincy transfers to another member. If you are the last member, the team is deleted. Continue?
user.teamsListDescription: Teams you are a member of across all competitions.
user.teamsEmptyHint: Join a competition and create or join a team to get started.

form.detailsDescription: Configure the basic settings for this competition

transition.closeRegistrationConfirm: This will prevent new teams from joining. Continue?
transition.goLiveConfirm: This will start the competition. Teams will be synced to LanBrackets. Continue?
transition.markFinishedConfirm: This will end the competition. Are you sure?

sidebar.notSynced: Not synced yet. Sync happens automatically after creation.

admin.deleteTeamConfirm: Delete team "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

adminTickets.rotateConfirm: Rotate the validation token for this ticket? The current QR code will stop working.

games.gameInfoDescription: Update the basic details for this game
games.modesDescription: Manage the available modes for this game
games.deleteHint: Permanently delete this game and all its modes.
games.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The game and all its modes will be permanently removed.

events.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The event will be permanently removed.

form.eventInfoCreateDescription: Provide the basic details for this event
form.eventInfoEditDescription: Update the basic details for this event
form.scheduleCreateDescription: Set the start and end date and time
form.scheduleEditDescription: Update the start and end date and time
form.venueCapacityCreateDescription: Optionally assign a venue and set the seating capacity
form.venueCapacityEditDescription: Update the venue and seating capacity
form.mediaCreateDescription: Optionally add one or more banner images. Multiple images will cycle automatically.
form.mediaEditDescription: Add or remove banner images. Multiple images will cycle automatically.
form.acceptedFormats: Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP. Max 5 MB each.

public.emptyHintUpcoming: Check back later for new events.
public.emptyHintPast: Past events will appear here once they have ended.

push.label: Browser push notifications
push.blockedHint: Push notifications are blocked in your browser. Enable them in your browser settings.
push.activeHint: You will receive push notifications in this browser.
push.offHint: Get notified instantly in this browser, even when the site is not open.
push.bannerDescription: Get instant notifications in your browser, even when the site isn't open.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters

banner.title: We respect your privacy
banner.description: We use cookies that are strictly necessary for the site to work. With your consent we also use privacy-friendly analytics (Plausible) to understand how the site is used. You can withdraw your consent at any time via the "Cookie settings" link in the footer.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: These cookies are required to operate the site. They include the session cookie, CSRF protection, your language choice and the sidebar state. They cannot be switched off.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Privacy-friendly, cookieless analytics via Plausible to measure aggregate usage (page views, referrers, devices). No personal data, no cross-site tracking.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.empty: Imprint content has not been configured yet.

index.title: Legal documents
index.lead: These documents govern your use of this platform. Each policy links to its current version.
index.empty: No policies have been published yet.

required.title: Action required
required.description: Please review and accept the following policy updates to continue.
required.intended_url_hint: You'll be returned to your previous page after accepting.

index.title: Policies
index.description: Manage the platform's terms, privacy, and other consent policies
index.no_policies: No policies yet. Create one to get started.
index.no_types_yet_lead: No policy types yet. You need at least one type before you can create a policy.

create.title: New policy
create.description: Create a new policy. You can publish its first version on the next page.
create.name: Name

edit.title: Edit {name}
edit.description: Edit metadata. Content is managed by publishing new versions.
edit.name: Name
edit.archive_confirm: Archive this policy? It will no longer apply to new acceptances or registration. This action does not cascade-delete versions.

show.no_versions_yet: No versions yet. Publish the first one to make this policy effective.

version_create.title: Publish new version of {name}
version_create.description: Markdown is rendered into a PDF snapshot at publish time.
version_create.is_non_editorial_help: Tick this only when the change affects user rights. It will email all {count} prior acceptors and force re-acceptance on next login.
version_create.public_statement_placeholder: Explain why the policy is changing and what it means for the user's rights.

confirm.step1_title: About to publish a non-editorial version
confirm.step1_body: Publishing will email all {count} prior acceptors with the new policy as a PDF attachment, and require every active user to re-accept this policy on next login. Editorial fixes (typos, formatting) should NOT use this checkbox.
confirm.step2_body: {count} emails will be queued immediately. This cannot be undone.

types.title: Manage policy types
types.description: Policy types group policies by purpose (Terms of Service, Privacy, Code of Conduct, …). Every policy belongs to one type. Types in use cannot be deleted.
types.no_types: No types yet. Create the first one below.
types.label: Label
types.delete_confirm: Delete policy type "{label}"? This will fail if any policy still references it.

help.askForHelpTooltip: Open a support ticket in LanHelp

shop.title: Shop
shop.noTicketsAvailable: No tickets available at this time.
shop.addonRequiresTicket: Can only be purchased in combination with a ticket.
shop.loginToPurchase: Please log in to purchase tickets.
shop.noEventsDescription: There are currently no events with tickets available for purchase.
shop.redirectNotice: You will be redirected to complete payment.
shop.emptyCartDescription: Browse our ticket shop and add items to your cart.

checkoutSuccess.title: Order Confirmed
checkoutSuccess.heading: Order Confirmed!
checkoutSuccess.description: Your tickets have been purchased successfully. You can manage them from your tickets page.

ticketCard.rotateConfirm: Rotating the QR invalidates any previously printed or shared copy. Continue?

tickets.title: My Tickets
tickets.description: Manage your owned, managed, and assigned tickets
tickets.noOwned: You don't own any tickets yet.
tickets.noManaged: You don't manage any tickets yet.
tickets.noAssigned: You haven't been assigned any tickets yet.

seat.addAttendeeHint: Add an attendee to pick a seat.
